strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Current role at re:cinq involves TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), matching the stack
Strong testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, workshops on testing and Selenium)
concerns: Resume shows limited explicit Nest.js and Vitest experience
React exposure is mentioned but appears secondary compared to Ember.js and DLang work
No clear evidence of Kotlin experience, only Java in older robotic-arm projects

key_factors.factor: Depth of full-stack experience with TS/Node.js
Gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifics

response.justification: The candidate exceeds the 6+ years requirement with deep full-stack experience and directly relevant current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling in TypeScript/Node.js. Testing discipline and architecture exposure are strong, and React plus cloud/containerization experience are present. The main gaps are explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin work, but the breadth of languages and demonstrated learning agility make those low-risk.
